lines: The Fever lost to the Phoenix Mercury 111‑109 yesterday and will host the Los Angeles Sparks Saturday at 8 PM ET.
The Indianapolis Indians beat the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders 8‑6 yesterday and will play them again tonight at 7:05 PM ET.
The World Cup is on tonight with Turkey vs. the United States at 10 PM ET, and the Chicago Cubs just beat the New York Mets 10‑5 in a doubleheader game yesterday.
Caitlin Clark averages about 21 points a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers.
escape_hatch: you follow this way closer than I do.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Thursday, June 25. The Fever lost to the Phoenix Mercury 111‑109 yesterday and will host the Los Angeles Sparks Saturday at 8 PM ET. The Indianapolis Indians beat the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders 8‑6 yesterday and will play them again tonight at 7:05 PM ET. The World Cup is on tonight with Turkey vs. the United States at 10 PM ET, and the Chicago Cubs just beat the New York Mets 10‑5 in a doubleheader game yesterday. Caitlin Clark averages about 21 points a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers. And if it gets away from you, your out is: you follow this way closer than I do.
